scripts.render:webm: remotion render src/index.ts DashboardPreview out/dashboard-preview.webm --codec=vp9 --crf=12 && ffmpeg -y -i out/dashboard-preview.webm -an -c:v copy out/dashboard-preview.video-only.webm && mv out/dashboard-preview.video-only.webm out/dashboard-preview.webm
scripts.render:mp4: remotion render src/index.ts DashboardPreview out/dashboard-preview.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=10 --x264-preset=slow && ffmpeg -y -i out/dashboard-preview.mp4 -an -c:v copy out/dashboard-preview.video-only.mp4 && mv out/dashboard-preview.video-only.mp4 out/dashboard-preview.mp4
scripts.render:all: pnpm render:webm && pnpm render:mp4 && pnpm render:poster
scripts.sync:landing: cp out/dashboard-preview.webm ../../app-landing/public/dashboard-preview.webm && cp out/dashboard-preview.mp4 ../../app-landing/public/dashboard-preview.mp4 && cp out/dashboard-poster.jpg ../../app-landing/public/dashboard-poster.jpg
